{{Quote|Star Destroyer, this is Sayer Mon Neela of the Rebel Alliance. I order you to surrender your vessel.|[[Sayer Mon Neela]], during the [[evacuation of Horob]]|<ref name="TCoIH" />}}
The '''''Imperial Hazard''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Its [[Captain/Legends|captain]] was [[Sergus Lanox]], and the ship participated in [[Evacuation of Horob|attacking]] the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] base on [[Horob]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was damaged due to the bold intervention of Rebel strategist [[Sayer Mon Neela]] in the [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] ''[[Starcrossed]]''.<ref name="TCoIH" />
